page_content:
Undergraduate INFO Excellence Fund Award

The Undergraduate iSchool Excellence Fund Award is a merit-based scholarship given to current InfoSci students. Students interested in applying for this award must clearly state their post-baccalaureate educational and/or career goals and demonstrate how the INFO College Information Science undergraduate program is preparing them to achieve those goals. Students should highlight how Information Science courses they have completed, and co-/extra-curricular engagement have provided them with the requisite knowledge and professional preparation to meaningfully engage in the ﬁeld of information science.
